# 👋 Welcome to Coach Gravity

You're about to learn how to build real software — no coding experience required.

**To get started, type `/start` in the chat below.**

That's it. The tool will automatically download everything it needs and walk you through the rest.

---

💡 **Requirements**: Node.js 20+ must be installed on your computer.
If you don't have it, the `/start` workflow will help you install it.
